title: lonchocarpus ferrugineus
intro: Lonchocarpus ferrugineus, also known as the 'Jateorhiza palmata', is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The Lonchocarpus ferrugineus plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for their diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus ferrugineus include its potential to help manage urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis. Herbal preparations of Lonchocarpus ferrugineus are typically made by decocting the roots or seeds in water, and are often used in traditional remedies for their therapeutic effects.
